calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing As To Defendants (Notices)
Off Calendar Jul-21-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark Scott, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Orion First Financial LLC. (via Zoom)
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant A-Tex Roofing and Remodeling, Inc. A Texas Corporation; Nicolas Sanson, an individual

This matter comes on calendar this day,for a Default Prove-up hearing.

Matt Jacobs is sworn and testifies via Zoom.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Orion First Financial, LLC, a Washington Limited Liability Company and against Defendant A-Tex Roofing and Remodeling, Inc. A Texas Corporation; Nicolas Sanson, an individual as follows:

Principal $64,309.41
Pre-Judgment Interest $2,723.93
Attorney's Fees $1,820.30
Costs $740.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $69,593.64

Judgment signed in open court.

Judge: Murlene J. Randle, Clerk: M. Goodman, Reporter: FTR. (514/MJR)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-19-2022 Continued To Oct-05-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
